zh.of Littleton in Steeple Ashton, Wiltshir: 英國維爾爾李特頓 帕爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gatesden於大約1254年出生時，她的父親John de Gatesden36歲，母親Hawise Courtenay43歲。她於1298年與Lord William Paynel在英國維爾爾李特頓 帕爾結婚。她去世於1311年1月4日之前在英國素可特洛頓。

zh-hans.of Littleton in Steeple Ashton, Wiltshir: 英国維爾爾李特頓 帕爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gatesden于大约1254年出生时，她的父亲John de Gatesden36岁，母亲Hawise Courtenay43岁。她于1298年与Lord William Paynel在英国維爾爾李特頓 帕爾结婚。她去世于1311年1月4日之前在英国素可特洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gatesden was born about 1254, her father, John de Gatesden, was 36 and her mother, Hawise Courtenay, was 43. She married Lord William Paynel in 1298, in Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, England. She died before 4 January 1311, in Trotton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gatesden est née environ 1254, son père, John de Gatesden, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hawise Courtenay, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William Paynel en 1298, à Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée avant 4 janvier 1311, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Gatesden um 1254 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Gatesden 36 und ihre Mutter Hawise Courtenay 43. Sie hat 1298 in Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, England Lord William Paynel geheiratet. Sie starb vor 4. Januar 1311 in Trotton, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gatesden è nata il circa 1254, sua padre, John de Gatesden, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Hawise Courtenay, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Lord William Paynel nel 1298, nel Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, England. Morì prima del 4 gennaio 1311, nel Trotton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Gatesdenが約1254年に生まれた時，父John de Gatesdenは36歳，母Hawise Courtenayは43歳であった。1298年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアリットレトン プアンエルでLord William Paynelと結婚した。彼女は1311年1月4日以前にイギリススセックストロットオンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gatesden(이)가 대략 1254년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Gatesden(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Courtenay(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 윌츠히르 리틀레턴 파넬에서 Lord William Paynel(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1311년 1월 4일 이전 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Abt 1254–4 Jan 1311: ойролцоогоор 1254 он–1311 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 4–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gatesden nasceu aproximadamente 1254, seu pai, John de Gatesden, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Courtenay, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William Paynel em 1298, em Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu antes 4 de janeiro de 1311, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gatesden родилась около 1254 г., её отцу по имени John de Gatesden было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Courtenay, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William Paynel в 1298 г. в местности литлетон панелл, уилцхир, Англия. Она умерла перед 4 январь 1311 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gatesden nació aproximadamente 1254, su papá, John de Gatesden, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hawise Courtenay, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lord William Paynel en 1298, en Littleton Panell, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 4 de enero de 1311, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
